summary: Plan is well-structured, correctly references all existing interfaces, and fully covers the 4 acceptance criteria with 7 indirect mappings. Dependencies verified present in codebase.
notes: fnv1a is exported from src/seed/sessionSeed.ts and can be reused directly — no need for a local equivalent
AnalyserPipeline.frequency is Uint8Array with fftSize 2048, confirming 1024 bins — plan's bin ranges are valid
BrowserSignals interface confirms all referenced fields: timezone, devicePixelRatio, hardwareConcurrency, prefersReducedMotion
PointerState confirms speed and active fields needed by mapPointerDisturbance
GeoHint.country and GeoHint.region are both string|null, matching null-fallback logic in step 2

Step 1 mentions PALETTE_FAMILIES lookup table but step 2 uses direct hashing — recommend dropping the lookup table in favor of the hash approach described in step 2, which is simpler and already coarse enough
Test directory structure should use tests/visual/mappings.test.ts to match existing pattern (tests/seed/, tests/audio/, etc.)
risks_acknowledged: FFT bin ranges are sample-rate-dependent — acceptable for artistic use
Pointer smoothing constants will need tuning against real interaction
